rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS IVELI
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (88-98 Castro Street, San Francisco, Ca 94114)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared/addressed: (1) Need clarification of the terms of the sale. Attachment 4f sets forth 100% interests related information. It needs to specify applicable information relating to the 50% interest which is truly subject to this petition. (2) Attachment 4f. #10 to be clarified. The current first bidder (buyer) is an LLC. Petition needs to clarify the buyers' info/title further. (3) Attachment 4f, #3 needs to specify the amount applicable for the 50% interest. (4) Proposed order to be modified accordingly. (5) Proof of publication not on file. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EVA C. TOLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/12/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The amendment to the third amended petition was not e-filed until 4/26/24, which was not at least 15 days before this hearing. Furthermore, the proof of service shows that notice was mailed on 4/25/24, before the amendment was e-filed. [LRSF 14.14 A.] Notice of the 6/12/24 hearing must be given to (or waived by) Inheritance Funding and Probate Advance. (2) Administrator states that he gave notice to the Director of Health Care Services on 7/14/22, but no response was received from the Department of Public Health. Notice was, in fact, mailed to the Department of Public Health Vital Records (Exhibit C to the third amended petition), not to the Director of Health Care Services, as required by Probate Code Section 9202(a). The hearing might need to be continued further if the DHCS was not properly noticed (or will not waive notice if notice to the DHCS was required.) (3) Attorney costs show multiple rather high amounts, when most of the papers should have been e-filed, and e-filing costs should have been $5.00 per e-filing. The filing fee for the initial petition was $435, not $518.50. There were two proofs of service filed on 1/13/22, and one of them was the incorrect JC form, so the estate should not be charged for an incorrect form. There was no need to file a notice of intent to appear remotely or notice of filing I&A, and there was no need for the administrator to give himself notice of proposed action. Why were two charges ($148 and $128) on 4/2/22 for filing the confidential statement and delivering a courtesy copy? This Court does not ordinarily allow fees for legal research. Deadline is 6/3/24 for providing the assigned examiner the courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (NB: In order for this Court to track closed matters, orders to terminate and distribute an estate must begin with the following language: "Order for Final Distribution." [LRSF 14.35 I.6.b.])

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM COLE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/12/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) A second amended petition was filed on 3/25/24 (e-filed on 3/26/24). How could notice of it have been published, starting on 3/18/24? (The second amended petition shows a hearing date of 4/2/23...) (2) No proof of service of notice of the Second Amended Petition for Letters of Administration has been filed. (A proof of service filed on 3/27/24 was for the Amended Petition to be heard on 4/2/24.) (3) Items 5a(3) or (4) and (7) or (8) of the second amended petition are incomplete. (4) Items 6 and 7 of the second amended petition are incomplete, although Decedent was apparently not survived by a spouse or registered domestic partner or issue. (Item 8 still shows Bonnie Sims as "daughter.") (5) The allegation that Bonnie Sims is not a legal daughter was filed on 3/27/24 in a "Third Supplement to Petition for Letters of Administration" when a Second Amended petition was filed that supersedes the petition... (6) Petitioner has not provided authority for the Court to appoint an unregistered domestic partner. [Probate Code Section 8461.] (7) No corrected Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities has been filed yet with all of the information required in item 2. (A document called "Petitioner's 2nd Supplement to Duties and Liabilities" filed on 4/27/23 shows a different address from the one shown on the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-147 and that supplement was also not verified.) (8) This Court does not ordinarily permit funds to be deposited in a blocked account at the outset of estate administration. [LRSF 14.16 M.3.] Deadline for filing responsive papers is 6/3/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE CASTILYN FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED AUGUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/12/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The ex parte petition to appoint a guardian ad litem was just filed on 4/25/24 and must be adjudicated before this petition can be fully noticed and heard. (2) Notice must include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] (3) The deed for the real property shows that the property was owned in joint tenancy; it passed by operation of law to the surviving joint tenant. (4) The two Wells Fargo bank statements from July and August 2021 show that they were in the petitioner's name alone. Can she not transfer those accounts to herself as the trustee now, if the accounts still exist? (5) Only the Schwab account ending xxx6394 and xxx4040 were in the deceased trustor's name alone. Two of the other accounts showed both names. Did they not pass to the petitioner as the surviving joint tenant? Only one account showed that they held it as community property. Please provide a courtesy copy of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 6/3/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Issues posted in the tentative rulings prior to a hearing are not Examiner's Notes posted on the hearing date. Such issues should be addressed by simply filing the supplement or amendment, as the case may be, and/or proof of service, if required, or by providing a missing proposed order, etc., not by narrating the actions to be taken to address the issues.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DELORISA TURNER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Procedural issues with petition: 1) A competing petition was filed by an individual with higher priority under Probate Code Section 8461. 2) Item 3f(1) of the petition indicates that decedent died intestate, but decedent's will dated December 31, 2018 has been lodged with the court. 3) Item 5a(6) of the petition indicates that decedent was survived by no child, which is inconsistent with the competing petition. 4) Petitioner's name is not listed in Item 8. 5) No Notice of Petition to Administer Estate (Form DE-121) has been filed (Probate Code Section 8100). 6) All notices must include language about remote appearances (San Francisco Local Rule 14.1.C.6). Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LUIS C. REYNOZO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will dated 7/26/23. [Probate Code Section 8225.] No appearance is required. Status of closing the estate will be set for 5/20/25. If a petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration is filed at least two weeks before 5/20/25, no appearance will be required on that date. (NB: A supplement (or amendment) to a petition should simply address information that is missing from (or incorrect in) a petition; it should not be an "answer sheet" to address procedural defects, A fiduciary or a proposed fiduciary must supplement or amend her own petition, not merely verify her attorney's statements.)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LIVING TRUST OF THE BASSO FAMILY
rulings.Calendar Matter: First And Final Account And Report Of Successor Trustee; And Petition For Order: 1) Settling And Approving Account And Report; 2) Approving Successor
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/18/24. (No earlier availability.) Unless otherwise permitted for good cause, if an account exceeds two years, the first two years must be filed separately. After the first two-year account is adjudicated, subsequent account periods may not be for more than three (3) years and each three-year period must be filed separately. [LRSF 14.34 A.] If the trustee seeks Court approval of its accounting, etc., the accounting must be amended to limit the first accounting period to the first two years. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B. (A courtesy copy of the 176-page petition and related papers would be appreciated.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MAURICE ELLIS GOLDMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/29/24 for filing of proof of publication. All documents to be filed by 5/13/24.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MONSERRATE MAGOBET
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/12/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No will appears to have been lodged or filed. (3) No proof of service of notice has been filed. (4) No Acknowledgement of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities has been filed. (5) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 6/3/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/11/2024. Notes emailed to counsel on 05/02/2024.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIE FRANCIS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/12/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (2) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. (3) Attachment 3e(3) to the petition is unclear. Did the other daughter, Denise Riley, die in 2011 or 2017? (4) Both the wife and the other daughter post-deceased, so they (or, now, their estates) have an interest in this estate. Who are their successors-in-interest? Has anyone been appointed for their estates or did they have trusts? (5) If there are no assets of any value, why is this proceeding necessary? Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 6/3/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PATRICIA C. VELLA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing solely to admit the will. No appearance required. Status hearing is set for 07/08/2025. The personal representative shall file either a petition for an order for final distribution of the estate or a report of the status of administration in compliance with Prob. Code sec. 12200 two weeks before the hearing date.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHRISTINA LIM
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status hearing on close of estate will be set for 06/10/2025.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: CHRISTOPHER ALFRED RIPPS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Proposed Order Establishing Fact of Death(FORM VS 109) must be submitted with the information completed thereon. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
